mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.password_hash, u.name, u.email, u.phone, u.role, u.status, s.failed_login_count, s.last_failed_at, s.locked_until, s.last_login_at, s.password_changed_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_login_security s ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.login_id = #{loginId}

SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.password_hash, u.name, u.email, u.phone, u.role, u.status, s.failed_login_count, s.last_failed_at, s.locked_until, s.last_login_at, s.password_changed_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_login_security s ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.password_hash, u.name, u.email, u.phone, u.role, u.status, s.failed_login_count, s.last_failed_at, s.locked_until, s.last_login_at, s.password_changed_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_login_security s ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.name = #{name} AND u.email = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.password_hash, u.name, u.email, u.phone, u.role, u.status, s.failed_login_count, s.last_failed_at, s.locked_until, s.last_login_at, s.password_changed_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_login_security s ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.name = #{name} AND u.phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.password_hash, u.name, u.email, u.phone, u.role, u.status, s.failed_login_count, s.last_failed_at, s.locked_until, s.last_login_at, s.password_changed_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_login_security s ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.login_id = #{loginId} AND u.name = #{name} AND u.email = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.user_id, u.login_id, u.password_hash, u.name, u.email, u.phone, u.role, u.status, s.failed_login_count, s.last_failed_at, s.locked_until, s.last_login_at, s.password_changed_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_login_security s ON s.user_id = u.user_id WHERE u.status = 'ACTIVE' AND u.login_id = #{loginId} AND u.name = #{name} AND u.phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
